meaning: n.娴风洍琛屼负,渚电姱鐗堟潈,闈炴硶缈诲嵃 鐩楃増
examples: Seven of the fishermen have been formally charged with piracy.
Recently, piracy has become a hot topic under discussion.
He no longer took an interest in war, nor even in piracy.
Some in the central government believe piracy hurts Chinese economic growth, and they want to fight it.
We have joined forces to meet other challenges such as terrorism, piracy and proliferation.
